# Villedge

> Villedge is the coordination layer for popup villages — a global network connecting people, communities, ideas, and places working toward a new Renaissance.

Villedge helps people discover popup villages around the world, join existing ones, or start their own. Each village is a temporary or permanent place where a better future is not merely discussed, but lived, practiced, and built.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Global interactive map of popup and permanent villages worldwide.
- [Embed the map](/widget): Embed the live Villedge map of popup villages on any website.

## Optional

- [Embed view](/embed): Lightweight, embeddable version of the map.
